name: Polo Lounge Dutch Apple Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine milk, flour, eggs, 3 tablespoons granulated sugar, and almond extract.
Mix until well blended.
2. Pour the batter into a hot, well-greased 10-inch skillet, tilting the pan so that the batter forms a collar around the sides of the pan.
3. Arrange apple wedges in a single layer over the batter.
4. Sprinkle the remaining 1/4 cup granulated sugar and cinnamon evenly over the apples.
5. Bake at 350 to 375 degrees Fahrenheit until the batter is set and the surface is browned, about 45 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
Serve with jams or preserves if desired. (From the Beverly Hills Hotel.) Source: San Diego Union Tribune, Nov 3, 1994.
